channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DoorDash wants you to stop scrolling and just tell its new AI chatbot what you're hungry for
item.description: The chatbot will be rolled out to more users in the coming weeks.

item.title: Florida's insurance exodus is triggering a 2008-style chain reaction — with one critical difference
item.description: Can't get home insurance in Florida? Your neighbor's property value just became your problem too.

item.title: AI was supposed to cut health care costs. One of its first jobs was charging you more, PwC report shows
item.description: AI is one of five potential drivers of health costs climbing up to 9% in 2027, according to PwC.

item.title: You may think you are open-minded, but true openness can trigger death anxiety
item.description: As the famous Jack Nicholson line from 'A Few Good Men' suggests, you cannot handle the truth.
